intro: Yinshania rivulorum, also known as Chinese angelica, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and aid in wound healing. The bioactive constituents of Yinshania rivulorum include lignans, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Traditional herbal preparations made with Yinshania rivulorum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, flu, and other respiratory infections.
